results.rendered_html:
prati-saṃ-√dhā P. Ā. -dadhāti, -dhatte, (P.) to put together again, re-arrange,  ŚBr. ;
(Ā.) to put on, adjust (an arrow),  MBh. ;
(Ā.) to return, reply,  Hariv. ;  BhP. ;
(P. Ā.) to remember, recollect,  Nyāyas. ;
(Ā.) to comprehend, understand,  Prab. vi, 2/3.

results.rendered_html:
pratisaṃdhā 3 U.
1 To re-adjust.
2 To aim at, direct
3 To conceive, comprehend.
4 To be, fasten.
5 To put on, wear.
6 To restore, return.
7 To compose oneself.
8 To fit (as an arrow to the bow-string.)
